purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_right_eye mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: extremely subtle photoreal subject-right eye detail preservation pass, preserve exact person identity, gaze direction, eye shape, eyelid fold, eyelashes, iris color, catchlight, eyebrow position, nearby hair occlusion, surrounding skin texture, nose bridge, face lighting, white blazer, background, and portrait composition unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, gaze change, mismatched eyes, asymmetrical gaze, crossed eyes, enlarged eye, anime eye, doll eye, glassy eye, iris color change, catchlight change, eyelid deformation, eyelash mutation, eyebrow change, hair mutation, hair occlusion change, nose bridge change, face shape drift, skin tone change, visible seam, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: subject-right eye detail without gaze drift
no iris, catchlight, eyelid, or eyelash deformation
no visible seam around the single-eye mask

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 subject-right-eye mask as the inpaint mask with very low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing one-eye gaze, hair, and symmetry drift.
